modules.sql: SELECT i.customer_id, COALESCE(c.first_name, '') AS first_name, COALESCE(c.last_name, '') AS last_name, COUNT(*) AS investment_count, ROUND(SUM(i.current_value), 2) AS total_value, MAX(i.ifw_effective_date) AS ifw_effective_date FROM investments i LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT id, first_name, last_name FROM customers) c ON c.id = i.customer_id GROUP BY i.customer_id ORDER BY i.customer_id
